title: Historic Demand Data 2026
description: Historic electricity demand, interconnector, wind and solar outturn data for 2026. Please find a brief summary of some of the columns in the dataset: ND = National Demand is the sum of metered generation, but excludes generation required to meet station load, hydro storage pumping and interconnector exports TSD = Transmission System Demand is equal to the ND plus the additional generation required to meet station load, pump storage pumping and interconnector exports
